name: Ely Callaway Golf & Learning Center
about: The Ely Callaway Golf & Learning Center in Oceanside is a 4,400 square-foot facility dedicated to youth golf and life skills education. Opened in 2012, it serves as a second home for Pro Kids members, offering a comprehensive environment with both indoor learning spaces and a six-hole outdoor course. The center's mission is to use golf as a vehicle for character development and academic enrichment, providing a supportive space for underserved youth to excel both on and off the course. Its amenities include classrooms, a computer lab, a library, and a golf simulator, making it a versatile space for both structured programs and community events.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive youth-focused programming blending golf with life skills education
Well-rounded facility including both indoor learning spaces and a functional six-hole course
Designed to foster character development and provide academic support to underserved youth

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food or drink service

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions a 'golf simulator' but provides no specific brand or model information.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether equipment is provided. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification on club rentals or requirements.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at the facility. While BYOB policies are not specified, the venue's focus is on youth programming and education, suggesting that bringing outside food and drinks may not be standard practice. Please contact the venue for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility features a six-hole, par-3 course. Therefore, an 18-hole round is not possible at this location. Playing a full round on the six-hole course would involve three loops of the course.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Ely Callaway Golf & Learning Center is explicitly designed for and serves youth. It is a core component of the Pro Kids and First Tee - San Diego programs, which focus on developing underserved youth through golf and life skills education.
